allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; const keys = Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => k.includes\('motion'\) || k.includes\('framer'\) || k.includes\('spring'\) || k.includes\('anime'\)\); console.log\(keys.length ? keys : 'none'\); console.log\('has framer:', !!deps['framer-motion']\);")
